//: design-sync ONLY. The converter's tsconfig-paths plugin matches a barrel directory at the empty-extension step before trying /index.ts, so bare directory imports (@/theme, @/locales, ...) would resolve to a directory and fail. We map every barrel under app/src to its index file explicitly, listed BEFORE the @/* wildcard so the specific rule wins. Non-barrel @/x/y imports fall through to @/* (which resolves files correctly). baseUrl points at app/ so ./src/* resolves from here.
